description_long: This is a vintage-style, freestanding alarm clock with a round, metal body and two prominent bells on top, connected by a curved handle. The clock face is white with black Roman numerals and two black hands, enclosed by a slightly weathered, dark metallic casing with patches of reddish rust. The front glass is absent, exposing the face and hands directly. The back of the clock reveals a battery compartment, indicating it is powered by a single AA battery. The clock stands on two angled metal legs, giving it stability and a classic appearance. The overall finish is matte and rough, with visible signs of age and wear, making it suitable for urban or industrial-themed settings.
description: A vintage, metal alarm clock with a round face, Roman numerals, and twin bells on top, showing signs of rust and wear. It stands on two angled legs and has a visible battery compartment at the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the clock face with Roman numerals, two black hands, and the twin bells and handle on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the clock's thick, cylindrical metal body and the protruding bell and handle structure.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the open back with a visible AA battery compartment and the inner cavity of the clock.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the cylindrical body, bell, and handle, with angled legs visible at the bottom.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black Roman numerals, two black hands, and subtle printed text in the center.
